user.title: City of York Bins
user.description:
Enter your UPRN to find your bin collection schedule.

To find your UPRN: go to the [York Council bin collections page](https://myaccount.york.gov.uk/bin-collections), open your browser's developer tools and go to the **Network** tab. Search for your address and select it from the dropdown — then look for a request to the `waste-api` domain. Your UPRN will be visible in the file/URL column of that request.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the York Bins API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_uprn: No bin collections were found for this UPRN. Please double-check the number.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the Home Assistant logs.
